codeQuality.comments: Clean algorithm implementations for graph traversal (circular deps), set operations (orphaned tasks), and assertion ID validation. Good use of TypeScript readonly arrays.

VAL-M2-VALIDATE-001.notes: Circular dependency detection uses DFS with visit tracking to detect cycles in task dependencies

VAL-M2-VALIDATE-002.notes: Orphaned task detection identifies tasks that have no path from any root task

VAL-M2-VALIDATE-003.notes: Invalid assertion ID detection validates format (PREFIX-XXX-...) and existence in contract

VAL-M2-VALIDATE-004.notes: Validation returns clear error messages indicating what failed and which tasks/features are affected
